slide1.description: Discover a gastronomic experience that transports you to the heart of Italy.

slide2.description: Handcrafted dishes from time-honored recipes and the finest seasonal ingredients.

slide3.description: Where generations of culinary artistry meet the warmth of Italian hospitality.

block1.heading: Italy
block1.description: Visitors are drawn to its charming countryside, world-renowned vineyards, and the deep connection to Italy.

block2.heading: Reimagined
block2.description: Reimagining classic recipes, chefs bring a contemporary twist to beloved staples.

block3.heading: Gathering
block3.description: Where friends and family come together at the table, surrounded by the warmth of Italian hospitality.

chef.heading: Our Chef
chef.subtitle: SEASONED
chef.quote: Food is the universal language of mankind.
chef.bio1: Renowned Chef Antonio Carbone brings decades of culinary expertise and a passion for Italian cuisine to Figaro.
chef.bio2: With a Michelin-starred background, he has crafted a menu that celebrates the richness and diversity of Italian gastronomy.
chef.title: Head Chef
chef.name: Antonio Carbone

wine.heading: Wine Selection
wine.subtitle: Curated Collection
wine.description: Explore our carefully selected wines from renowned Mediterranean vineyards.

barolo.name: Barolo
barolo.description: Full-bodied red from Piedmont with notes of cherry, rose, and truffle.

barbaresco.name: Barbaresco
barbaresco.description: Elegant Nebbiolo with refined tannins and floral aromatics.

chianti.name: Chianti Classico
chianti.description: Classic Tuscan red with bright cherry and earthy undertones.

prosecco.name: Prosecco
prosecco.description: Sparkling white with crisp apple and pear notes.

soave.name: Soave
soave.description: Refreshing white wine with citrus and almond flavors.

christian.name: Christian Cooper
christian.text: Italiano exceeded my expectations! The staff was incredibly attentive and friendly, ensuring we had everything we needed. The Bistecca was cooked just the way I like it, and the tiramisu was the best I've ever had. The service, combined with the delicious food, made for an unforgettable evening.

emily.name: Emily Hughes
emily.text: A truly magical dining experience. From the moment we walked in, we felt like family. The pasta was fresh and perfectly seasoned, and the wine pairing recommendations were spot-on. We'll definitely be back.

alexander.name: Alexander Hayes
alexander.text: Exceptional Italian cuisine in an elegant setting. The Osso Buco was tender and flavorful, and the dessert selection was impressive. The attention to detail in both food and service made our anniversary dinner unforgettable.

carousel.heading: Quality Ingredients
carousel.subtitle: AUTHENTIC
carousel.description: We offer an exquisite culinary journey, featuring authentic dishes crafted with the finest regional ingredients.

slide1.title: Authentic Flavors
slide1.description: Every dish tells a story of tradition and passion. From our kitchen to your table, experience the true taste of Italy.

slide2.title: Wine & Dine
slide2.description: Our sommeliers have selected wines that perfectly complement each course. Raise a glass to la dolce vita.

slide3.title: Seasonal Ingredients
slide3.description: We source the finest seasonal produce and ingredients to bring you dishes that celebrate the best of each moment.

slide4.title: An Unforgettable Evening
slide4.description: Whether a romantic dinner or a celebration with loved ones, our restaurant sets the stage for memorable moments.

slide5.title: Crafted with Care
slide5.description: Our chefs pour heart and soul into every plate. Discover why guests return again and again.

homeBlog.heading: Resources & Articles
homeBlog.subtitle: Latest News
homeBlog.description: Understanding the regions, flavors, and best pairings for Italian wines.

dolceVita.subtitle: LA DOLCE VITA
dolceVita.heading: Love for Italian Food. Mamma Mia!
dolceVita.description: From classic pasta dishes to delectable seafood specialties, our menu showcases the vibrant flavors and rich traditions of Italian cuisine.

bolognese.name: Bolognese
bolognese.description: Classic spaghetti tossed in a savory, slow-cooked meat sauce with Parmesan.

carbonara.name: Carbonara
carbonara.description: Classic Roman dish with pancetta, eggs, Pecorino Romano, and black pepper.

calamari.name: Calamari
calamari.description: Crispy, golden-fried calamari served with a side of marinara and lemon wedges.

bistecca.name: Bistecca
bistecca.description: Juicy steak in a rich green peppercorn and brandy cream sauce.

lasagna.name: Lasagna
lasagna.description: Layers of pasta, slow-cooked meat sauce, béchamel, and Parmesan.

cacciatora.name: Cacciatora
cacciatora.description: A seafood twist featuring shrimp, calamari, and mussels in a fragrant tomato and white wine sauce.

branzino.name: Branzino
branzino.description: Whole Mediterranean sea bass oven-roasted with fresh herbs, garlic, and olive oil.

ossoBuco.name: Osso Buco
ossoBuco.description: A timeless Italian favorite, braised to perfection and paired with seasonal vegetables.

booking.heading: Book A Table
booking.subtitle: Get In Touch
booking.description: Celebrate the timeless flavors of Italy, where every meal is a masterpiece.

footer.description: Experience the essence of the Mediterranean at Kyma Cyprus
footer.address: 28 Archbishop Makarios III Ave, Limassol, Cyprus, 3035

events.subtitle: Gatherings & Celebrations
events.heading: Unforgettable Events
events.description: From intimate wine tastings to grand celebrations, Kyma Cyprus provides the perfect backdrop for your most cherished moments.

event1.title: Mediterranean Wine Evening
event1.description: An exclusive tasting journey through Cyprus's finest vineyards, paired with artisanal cheeses and coastal appetizers.

event2.title: Sunset Jazz & Seafood
event2.description: Experience the magic of live jazz against the backdrop of the Paphos sunset, featuring our signature seafood platters.

event3.title: Culinary Masterclass
event3.description: Join our Executive Chef for an intimate cooking session, learning the secrets of traditional Cypriot-Mediterranean fusion.

events.privateDescription: Whether it's an intimate rehearsal dinner, a milestone anniversary, or a corporate retreat, our dedicated events team will craft an experience tailored to your vision.
